name: skill-reorg-map
principle: Only Lev/conversational/operator hubs stay in active skills. Broader engineering/domain corpora live in skills-db and are surfaced through discovery.

keep_active.name: arch
keep_active.notes: Should route to deeper architecture and thinking corpus in skills-db rather than trying to contain the whole engineering domain in one active skill.

keep_active.name: cdo
keep_active.notes: Lev-native orchestration and evidence loop; stays active.

keep_active.name: work
keep_active.notes: Root tracked-work entry surface stays active.

candidate_active_hubs.name: engineering-hub
candidate_active_hubs.notes: May eventually subsume most non-Lev engineering reasoning from the active arch skill.

next_moves: curate the scraped framework pages into useful references rather than generic auto-generated skills
decide whether arch becomes a thin router to engineering-hub
define which active skills are Lev-native shells and which are broad knowledge domains that belong in skills-db
teach skill-discovery to boost engineering-hub and the architecture corpus for relevant queries
